name: Cheese Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1/2 to 1 inch of oil in a large heavy skillet.
2. Beat together eggs, milk, and TABASCO sauce.
3. Dip chicken pieces in the mixture and coat them well.
4. Mix flour, cheese, parsley, salt, and oregano in a paper bag.
5. Shake the chicken pieces to ensure they are thoroughly coated with the seasoning mixture.
6. Place the chicken in hot oil and cook for 20-25 minutes until golden brown and cooked through.
7. Drain the chicken on absorbent paper before serving. Serves 4.
